title: 4 BHK Luxury Villa for Sale in Gokul Road
description: An expansive 4 BHK independent villa with a private garden, home office and rooftop terrace. Premium Italian marble flooring, modular kitchen and covered parking for two cars. A rare luxury offering in the fast-growing Gokul Road belt.

faq.question: Is the villa Vastu compliant?
faq.answer: Yes, the villa is east-facing and fully Vastu compliant.

faq.question: How many cars can be parked?
faq.answer: There is covered parking for two cars plus visitor parking.

faq.question: Is the title clear?
faq.answer: Yes, the property has a clear and marketable title with all approvals.
